nasb.text: The Pharisees went out and immediately began conspiring with the Herodians against Him, as to how they might destroy Him.

esv.text: The Pharisees went out and immediately held counsel with the Herodians against him, how to destroy him.

cnv.text: 法利賽人出來，立刻和希律黨人商量怎樣對付耶穌，好除掉他。

ccb.text: 法利赛人离开后，立刻和希律党的人策划怎样除掉耶稣。

csbs.text: 那些法利赛人就出去，立刻与希律党的人一起商议怎样对付耶稣，好除灭他。
